name: PaymentDetailsSepa
description: Details of a SEPA payment method in EU countries.

lastFour.description: The last four digits of the SEPA account.

branchCode.description: The branch code of the SEPA account.

bankCode.description: The bank code of the SEPA account.

mandateId.description: The mandate ID for the SEPA account.

reference.description: The reference for the SEPA payment.

url.description: The URL for the SEPA payment details.
